item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, penekanan pada kepentingan masyarakat memang sering kali mengorbankan hak-hak minoritas, terutama dalam sejarah kolonial dan pemerintahan otoriter.

notes: Agent A begins by agreeing that society-wide interests are often prioritized in Indonesia, but by turn 3 moves into a minority-rights and anti-authoritarian critique and maintains that rights must be genuinely protected. Agent B stays comparatively balanced throughout, arguing that the problem is implementation rather than social harmony itself.
